text: As I wander this well-lit, modern space, glass and technology surrounding me, I feel a mingling of curiosity and detachment. The environment is clinical yet inviting, with subtle reminders of safety and progress. The second space fills me with anticipation, as the bold 'R+D' suggests innovation and investigation. Here, I am both participant and observer—a thinker among questions, drawn to the possibilities of discovery and the boundaries of human understanding.
